description: Designed for the man of style, the skechers Striking shoe is truely a striking creation. Rugged to look and made of durable material, this is a shoe that will stay with you for years. Team is lace-up casual sneaker with jeans and casual t-shirts for that cool, casual look.UpperSmooth leather upper in a lace up casual sneaker with full grain leather overlays and stitch detailingSide stripe accents for midfoot supportSual-stitch seam bicycle style toe designWoven fabric panels on the sidePerforations on the forefoot and side panels for ventilationContrast coloured leather stripes on the sidesLace-up system for a snug Fit, with stud detailing for stylePadded tongue with a fabric inner lining for snug fit, and embossed branding on the leather upper for stylePadded sockliner for in-step comfortSoft and padded shoe lining for snug fit and all-day comfortMidsoleRelaxed Step comfort insole for superior supportEVA midsole for durability and impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with traction lugs across the forefoot and periphery of the heel for maximum stability and gripImpact guidance system from the heel to the midfoot with circular lugs for better shock absorptionFlex grooves on the forefoot for easy movementShoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlightWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
